description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden wardrobe with a natural brown finish. The front features two large, clear glass-paneled hinged doors with small round knobs, revealing multiple interior shelves for storage. Below the doors are three spacious drawers, each equipped with matching round knobs for easy access. The sides and back are solid wood panels, providing structural support and a clean, minimalist appearance. The top of the wardrobe is slightly overhanging, adding a subtle decorative touch. The overall design is functional and classic, suitable for both residential and urban environments.
description: A tall, brown wooden wardrobe with glass-paneled double doors and three drawers, featuring round knobs and a classic, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two glass-paneled doors with round knobs and three drawers beneath, each with matching knobs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood panel with no visible features except the overhanging top.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, uninterrupted wooden back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a solid wood panel and overhanging top.
